creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Someone have asked me if I am working on this. I am not working on the  
update of audio/jack. It needs someone with C knowledge/skill to port it.  
Also, I am deaf so I know nothing about sound stuff and I can't test it  
either. ;-)

Cheers,
Mezz
